description: System semantic tag definitions. These define concepts; user tag applications are stored separately as assertions.

definitions.label: Positive
definitions.description: The target expresses blessing, approval, hope, comfort, gratitude, or another positive sentiment.

definitions.label: Negative
definitions.description: The target expresses warning, grief, judgment, opposition, lament, or another negative sentiment.

definitions.label: Command/Declaration
definitions.description: The target contains or expresses an instruction, imperative, charge, formal declaration, or authoritative statement.

definitions.label: Question
definitions.description: The target contains or expresses a question, whether direct, rhetorical, or implied by the discourse.
